name: Pan-Seared Kale
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces fresh kale, (1 bunch), stems and tough ribs removed
2 teaspoons vegetable oil, preferably grapeseed oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse kale and shake to remove excess water, leaving only what clings to the leaves. Set aside.
2. In a wok or large deep skillet, heat both oils over high heat until hot but not smoking.
3. Add ginger and cook for 10 seconds, stirring constantly.
4. Add kale and garlic, turning with a large metal spoon or spatula.
5. When kale begins to wilt (about 2 minutes), add soy sauce and continue cooking, tossing, for 1 minute longer.
6. Transfer to a serving dish and top with sesame seeds, if desired.
